channel.title: jb-marketplace-plugins-jetbrains
channel.description: The latest JetBrains plugins on the JetBrains marketplace

item.title: Skill Search Everywhere - Fri Apr 03 11:09:09 UTC 2026
item.description:
Adds an AI Skills contributor to Search Everywhere and indexes local Codex skills plus Claude Code skills. The contributor participates in global Search Everywhere...
vendor: JetBrains s.r.o. downloads: 19 pricingModel: FREE xmlId: dmitry.batkovich.skill-search
